narrative:
Roundhead (precinct in Hardin County) has 431 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.6 percentage points.
